name: Quokka Exporter
description: Export BinaryNinja analysis to Quokka protobuf files
longdescription: Exports BinaryNinja analysis metadata, segments, types, functions, references, layout, and data to .quokka protobuf files compatible with the Quokka Python library.

installinstructions.Darwin: Run generate_proto.py to create bn_quokka/quokka_pb2.py, then install this directory as a BinaryNinja Python plugin.
installinstructions.Linux: Run generate_proto.py to create bn_quokka/quokka_pb2.py, then install this directory as a BinaryNinja Python plugin.
installinstructions.Windows: Run generate_proto.py to create bn_quokka/quokka_pb2.py, then install this directory as a BinaryNinja Python plugin.

author: Quarkslab
